description: Delete a recorded quantity, removing a single measurement from the source.
probe_semantics: Perform the deletion of the recorded quantity at the source's write boundary; the quantity ceases to exist and no value is delivered.

then: the quantity is no longer delivered

punts: AUTHORED for the quantity-ownership-cascade batch (MetaCoding-io6); no propose-terms row proposed this action
clone is deliberately NOT in this batch

flow-DSL cannot yet mint a quantity alias, so this action is adapter-reachable but not yet flow-reachable (record_log does not alias its owned quantities) — the adapter method and operation contract are honest plumbing awaiting a quantity-aliasing follow-up
PROVISIONAL until first_pack_seal is filled by a real sealed recording
